title: (Luigi Is) Better Off Astone
description:
Hi

Original idea by TheEpicROB:
https://youtu.be/mxFDj_FZCCE

Song: Alice Deejay - Better Off Alone
Source: Super Mario World (TV series)

All visuals and audio were done in Sony Vegas.

For those that are unaware, this is just an updated/visual version of a video I have already uploaded on my alt account back in 2013, so the audio has already been done for quite a while. The visuals however, were all done over the weekend. And as most of you know, I haven't uploading anything in... quite a while, so forgive me if I'm a little rusty in some areas.

Happy New Year

Alt Account:
